notes: Core Frogger mechanics are present (logs, turtles, cars, homes, timer, lives) but the frog's horizontal movement on water rows is broken—hopping left/right adjusts raw pixel x without snapping to grid, causing misalignment and frequent false drowning deaths, making the game frustratingly unplayable in the water section.
An exceptionally well-crafted Frogger clone with perfect grid-to-pixel movement logic, accurate collision, diving turtles, and proper home bay mechanics.
A recognizable and mostly working Frogger clone, but grid/drift logic and simplistic collision/home handling make it feel noticeably off from a polished, fully correct build.
